title: secretx-core: implement core traits and types
description: All backend crates and the umbrella depend on this crate. The skeleton in secretx-core/src/lib.rs exists from the initial publish but needs to be hardened. Implement: SecretValue (Zeroizing<Vec<u8>>, no Debug/Display/Clone, as_bytes/as_str/extract_field); SecretError (#[non_exhaustive] with NotFound/Backend/InvalidUri/DecodeFailed/Unavailable); SecretStore async trait (get/put/refresh/from_uri with Self:Sized); SigningBackend async trait (sign/public_key_der/algorithm); SigningAlgorithm enum (Ed25519/EcdsaP256Sha256/RsaPss2048Sha256). Unit tests must use independent test vectors, never the code as its own oracle. No feature flags. No optional deps.
